dialogues.you_en: How long have you had this pain?
When did the difficulty breathing start?
What type of reaction did you have?

dialogues.they_es: Me caí y no puedo mover el brazo.
dialogues.they_en: I fell and can't move my arm.
dialogues.you_en: Where exactly do you feel the pain?

dialogues.they_es: Tengo mareos y me siento mal.
dialogues.you_es: ¿Ha vomitado o ha perdido la conciencia?
dialogues.you_en: Have you vomited or lost consciousness?

dialogues.they_en: I have a very high fever.

dialogues.you_es: Presione aquí con firmeza. No se preocupe.

dialogues.they_en: Do I need to go to the hospital?
dialogues.you_es: Sí, vamos a llevarlo ahora mismo.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, we're going to take you right now.
